title: Norway's Possible Lineup to Face Senegal at the FIFA World Cup 2026
original_text:
The Norway national team has quickly become one of the stories of the opening round at the 2026 FIFA World Cup after making a triumphant return to football's biggest stage.

After ending a 28-year absence from the World Cup , Ståle Solbakken's side opened the tournament with an emphatic 4-1 victory over Iraq , immediately putting itself in a strong position in Group I .

Now, the Norwegians will look to take another significant step toward the Round of 16 when they face a talented and experienced Senegal side.

Norway arrived at the World Cup carrying high expectations thanks to a generation filled with attacking talent.

The combination of Erling Haaland's goal-scoring ability, Martin Ødegaard's creativity, and Alexander Sørloth's physical presence gives Norway one of the most dangerous front lines in the tournament.

The convincing win over Iraq only strengthened the belief that this team is capable of doing much more than simply advancing from the group stage.

Reports from the Norwegian camp suggest Solbakken could make one adjustment to the team that started the tournament opener.

Oscar Bobb is pushing for a place in the starting eleven, although the core of the squad is expected to remain unchanged.

After a successful opening match, Norway now faces a completely different test against one of Africa's most respected national teams.

Senegal's physicality, pace, and international experience will provide a much sterner challenge than the one Norway encountered in its World Cup debut against Iraq.

The Scandinavians know that another victory would put them in an excellent position to secure qualification for the knockout rounds, while a strong performance against Senegal would further establish them as one of the tournament's most exciting teams.

With Haaland leading the attack and Ødegaard pulling the strings in midfield, Norway will look to maintain the momentum from its impressive opening victory and continue its dream return to the World Cup stage.

Match Information

Match: Norway vs Senegal
Competition: FIFA World Cup 2026 – Group I
Date: June 22, 2026
City: Kansas City, United States
Head Coach: Ståle Solbakken
Captain: Martin Ødegaard

Follow all the action from the 2026 FIFA World Cup on beIN SPORTS.
